title: Meals
scope: Meal idea generator and decision assistant: filter a curated meal library by cuisine, effort, tags, and components to decide what to eat, log what was actually eaten, and grow the library over time. NOT recipes with ingredients/steps (the Recipes app) — Meals is about choosing what to make.

specs.title: Find meals
specs.behavior: Finding returns meals matching include/exclude filter criteria.

specs.title: List meals
specs.behavior: Listing returns the meal library, optionally filtered by tag, effort, or search.

specs.title: Random meal ideas
specs.behavior: Random picks meal ideas from the library, optionally filtered by tag or effort.

specs.title: Get a meal
specs.behavior: Getting returns a meal's full details including its components.

specs.title: Add a meal
specs.behavior: Adding records a meal idea in the library without logging it as eaten.

specs.title: Update a meal
specs.behavior: Updating changes a meal's metadata — name, effort, tags, description, notes, or rating.

specs.title: Rate a meal
specs.behavior: Rating sets a 1–5 star rating on a meal.

specs.title: List components
specs.behavior: Listing returns the reusable meal components (building blocks).

specs.title: Add a component
specs.behavior: Adding records a new reusable meal component.

specs.title: Log a meal
specs.behavior: Logging records what was actually eaten and grows the meal library as a side effect.

specs.title: Check today's meals
specs.behavior: Checking returns the meals logged today across all types.

specs.title: Recent meal log
specs.behavior: The meal log returns recent log entries (dinners, lunches, or both).

specs.title: List meal tags
specs.behavior: Listing returns all meal tags with their usage counts.
